footer_credits: Proudly developed in Istanbul by Turkish engineers with excellence and dedication.
footer_desc: A cross-platform system utility built with Rust & Svelte 5.
home_desc: A blazing fast, cross-platform system utility built with Rust, Svelte 5, and Tauri. Deep clean your OS safely, locally, and beautifully.
home_feat1_desc: Powered by Rust and Tokio async I/O. Scans and cleans your filesystem with unparalleled speed, unlocking gigabytes in seconds.
home_feat2_desc: Native performance and identical UI across Linux, macOS, and Windows. Build once, clean anywhere using Tauri v2.
home_feat3_desc: Strict zero-unsafe Rust architecture ensures zero crashes, zero memory leaks, and absolute safety for your operating system.
feat_desc: WebQ provides an extensive set of tools to reclaim storage space, boost system performance, and maintain privacy—all encapsulated in a stunning user interface.
feat_item1_desc: Powered by a highly concurrent Rust backend, WebQ iterates across millions of files in seconds. Identify hidden caches, old log files, package manager remnants, and leftover configuration data instantly.
feat_item2_desc: Free up gigabytes of storage by safely clearing npm, cargo, docker, and pip caches, along with browser cache arrays that hoard storage space on your primary drive.
feat_item3_desc: Every scan visualizes your disk usage in a sleek, glassmorphic Svelte 5 interface. Track the largest files and folders dynamically as the background engine discovers them.
feat_item4_desc: Written in Rust without any `unsafe` blocks. WebQ ensures that core system files are strictly blacklisted, utilizing user-level permissions to prevent accidental system bricks.
docs_hero_desc: Everything you need to know about setting up and using WebQ.
docs_install_linux: Download the AppImage, make it executable, and run it.
docs_install_macwin: Download the appropriate `.dmg` or `.msi` installer from the Downloads page and follow the setup wizard.
docs_usage_li1: Open WebQ from your application launcher.
docs_usage_li2: Navigate to the Scanner tab on the sidebar.
docs_usage_li3: Select the cache categories you wish to target (e.g., Cargo, NPM, Browsers).
docs_usage_li4: Click Deep Scan to analyze the directories.
docs_usage_li5: Review the detected junk files, then hit Clean Selected to permanently remove them.
docs_arch_p1: WebQ leverages Tauri v2 to bridge the gap between a high-performance system-level Rust core and a beautiful Svelte 5 frontend.
docs_arch_p2: The core analysis engine utilizes tokio::fs for asynchronous parallel traversal of directories, ensuring the UI remains perfectly fluid at 60fps during intense deep scans.
dl_hero_desc: Choose your operating system below to get the latest stable version of WebQ (v1.0.0). No installation required for portable formats.
dl_sys_req_desc: WebQ runs securely entirely locally on your machine. You do not need an internet connection after download. Administrative privileges might be required for deep system cache clearing on Windows and macOS.
